"

"

" + body,

def post_raw(body_bytes, ct="application/x-www-form-urlencoded", extra_hdrs="", label=""):
    return raw_req(
        b"POST / HTTP/1.1
Host: " + HOST.encode() + b"
"
        + extra_hdrs.encode('utf-8', errors='replace')
        + b"Content-Type: " + ct.encode() + b"
"
        + b"Content-Length: " + str(len(body_bytes)).encode() + b"
"
        + b"Connection: close

" + body_bytes,
        label=label)

def multipart(boundary, parts, ct_extra="", label=""):
    """parts = [(name, value, extra_headers), ...]"""
    body = b""
    for name, value, extra in parts:
        body += f"--{boundary}
".encode()
        body += f"Content-Disposition: form-data; name=\"{name}\"
".encode()
        if extra:
            body += extra.encode('utf-8', errors='replace')
        body += b"
"
        body += value.encode('utf-8', errors='replace') if isinstance(value, str) else value
        body += b"
"
    body += f"--{boundary}--
".encode()
    ct = f"multipart/form-data; boundary={boundary}{ct_extra}"
    return post_raw(body, ct=ct, label=label)
